spacing._comment_default_scope: Controls which ASCII table cells get the spacing heuristic pass (e.g., "1 to4" -> "1 to 4", "12psi" -> "12 psi"). Valid values: "all_cells" (apply to every table cell, including headers/labels) or "numeric_cols_only" (apply only to columns inferred as numeric/value columns; inference uses header role keywords/synonyms and/or numeric ratios in body rows).

variant_rescue._comment_debug_output: If you want to see which OCR variants were considered and which value was selected during variant rescue, set env var EIDAT_TABLE_CELL_HEAL_VARIANT_DEBUG=1 (or EIDAT_TABLE_CELL_HEAL_DEBUG=1). The healer will write JSONL events to <artifacts_dir>/table_cell_heal_variant_rescue.jsonl for that run.
